preferences.personality: Frugal retired engineer. Watches the utility meter daily. Will gladly shift loads to save a dollar but does not want to wake up to a cold shower.

private_context.reason: Kids' clothes from the school week

preferences.personality: Busy parents of two kids. Comfort and predictable routines beat squeezing every cent. Two cars, soccer practice, the occasional Saturday trip. Quietly proud of the panels.
Eco-conscious WFH consultant. Reads the grid's hourly carbon intensity for fun. Happy to defer laundry to a windy afternoon. Solar pays the morning coffee.
